Document:
# Roleplay Rules
Roleplay rules are in effect at all times when you are in game. The only exceptions to this are during the deathmatch gamemode or if an admin explicitly states otherwise.
Roleplay rules are in effect even while at Central Command, at the end of the round.
See the list of [textlink="role types" link="RoleTypes"] for more information about the different types of roles.
- [textlink="0. Don't be an asshole" link="CarpmosiaRuleR1"] - [textlink="1. Don't use out of character knowledge" link="CarpmosiaRuleR2"] - [textlink="2. Roleplay a character that fits into the world" link="CarpmosiaRuleR3"] - [textlink="3. Follow your role" link="CarpmosiaRuleR4"] - [textlink="4. Act responsible when playing an Antagonist" link="CarpmosiaRuleR5"] - [textlink="5. Follow reasonable escalation" link="CarpmosiaRuleR6"] - [textlink="6. Act professional as command or security" link="CarpmosiaRuleR7"]
